_meta.method: Read-only SQLite query on practice_locations scoped to: state='IL', zip IN watched_zips, entity_classification NOT IN ('specialist','non_clinical','da_unverified','duplicate_location'), phone IS NOT NULL. Group by (phone, zip); find combos with >1 location_id. Pairwise address similarity via difflib.SequenceMatcher on normalized addresses (lowercased, suite/unit/floor/ste/#/apt tokens stripped, punctuation removed). House numbers extracted and compared explicitly — different house numbers always → distinct, regardless of string ratio (prevents 141 vs 111 type false positives). Trunk-line detection: phone appearing in >=3 distinct ZIPs across all scoped combos.

thresholds.pair_likely_dup: same house number AND ratio>=0.80, OR no house numbers extracted AND ratio>=0.90
thresholds.pair_distinct: explicitly different house numbers (regardless of ratio), OR no house numbers AND ratio<0.60
thresholds.pair_ambiguous: same house, ratio in [0.60,0.80), or edge cases
thresholds.combo_likely_duplicate: any pairwise comparison → likely_dup (trunk-line override: requires ratio>=0.95)
thresholds.combo_distinct_shared_phone: all pairs → distinct; or trunk-line phone with no high-match pairs
thresholds.combo_needs_review: mix of ambiguous pairs, no clear likely_dup
thresholds.trunk_line_suspect: phone appears in >=3 ZIPs in scope
